updates.heading: PM/PD Channel Access — Source Gap
bullets: PM/PD-specific Slack channels (e.g. #pm-invite, #product-invite) were not accessible via channel search — they may be private or named differently.
Cross-org updates are fully covered in shared data above.
If you'd like to add PM/PD-specific updates, share the channel name and I'll pull them in on the next run.

updates.heading: VMA Practice Simulator Pilot — Recruiter Nominee Needed
bullets: Lisa Pham needs 1 recruiter nominee from the PM/PD team for the VMA Practice Simulator pilot.
Start identifying who to tap from your team.
